titleStmt.title: SII 24.416: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 416. (A.R. No. 260 of 1930.) II PRĀKĀRA, SĒṈAIMUDALIYĀR SHRINE, WEST WALL.

summary.p: Registers the grant of the village Teṉ-Pirambil in Pirambil-paṟṟu situated in, Karambai-nāḍu included in the Tañjāvūr-uśāvaḍi, by Kaśavu-cheṭṭiyār, son of Ūṭṭukkūr Tammu-cheṭṭiyār of Parambāla gōtra and a traivarṇika of Peruṅgoṇḍai, for offerings to god Raṅganātha at Tiruvaraṅgam situated in Viḻāvaṟāvīdi-vaḷanāḍu, a district of Teṉkarai Pāṇḍikulāśani-vaḷanāḍu. Specifies a fourth share of the offerings to be made over to the Rāmānujakūṭam (feeding), in the name of the donor. The details of date viz., Śaka 1456, Jaya, Vṛishabha for Vṛiśchika, śu. Pañchamī, Tuesday, Uttirāḍam correspond to 1534 A.D., November 10, Tuesday; ·56:

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrīman mahārājādhirāja rājaparameśvara śrīvirapratāpa śrīvira A
ccuta devamahārāyar pṛthuvirājyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa śakābdam 100 4 10 56 Itaṉ mel cellāniṉṟa ceyasamvatsarattu viruṣadhafor ‘bha’nāyaṟṟu pūvvapakṣattu pañcamiyum maṅkalavāramum peṟṟa
Uttirāṭa nakṣatrattu nāḷ teṉkarai pāṇḍikulaācani vaḷanāṭṭu viḻāvaṟāvīti vaḷanāṭṭu tiruvara
ṅkaṉ tiruppatiperumāḷ śrīraṅganāthatevar śrīpaṇṭārattukku peruṅkoṇṭai traivarṇikaril
parampāla gotrattu Ūṭṭukkūr tammuceṭṭiyār putran kacavu ceṭṭiyāreṉ poliyūṭṭu cilāśāsanam paṇṇikkuṭutta
paṭi tañcāūr Ucāvaṭi karampaināṭṭu pirampil paṟṟu teṉpirampil Ūr 1 Inta Ūr Oṉṟukkum nāṉku Ellaikku Uḷpaṭṭa nañcey
puñcey Uḷppaṭa tiruvāḻikkallum poṭuvittu Inta Ūr poliyūṭṭākac cettapaṭiāle Inta teṉpirampil Ūr Oṉṟum perumāḷ śrī
paṇṭārattile paṟṟukkaṭṭikkoṇṭu Inta Ūril Utaiyaṅkoṇṭe nāḷ Oṉṟukku perumāḷ śrīraṅganāthatevarkku Amutuceytaruḷa
kkaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭa taḷikai mūṉṟu Inta taḷikai muṉṟukkum Amutupaṭi paruppu Amutu neyyamutu kaṟi Amutu vakai Uḷppaṭa palacampāramum perumāḷ
śrī paṇṭārattile viṭṭu Intappirampil paṟṟu teṉpirampil Ūr Oṉṟum śrīpaṇṭārattile paṟṟukkaṭṭikkoṇṭu Ācantrāgyastāyi Āka
Aṉupavittukkoḷḷak kaṭavarkaḷ Ākavum Inta poliyūṭṭu viṭṭavaṉ viḻukkāṭu nālil Oṉṟum kacavuceṭṭi dharmmamāṉa Irāmaāṉuca
kkūṭattil nāḷtoṟum śrīvaiṣṇavarkaḷukku Amutuceytaruḷak kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭapaṭi(paṭi) yāle santrādityavaraiyum naṭakkakkaṭavatā
kavum Inta poliyūṭṭu cilāśāsanam Eḻutiṉamaikku koyiṟkkaṇakku śrīraṅganārāyaṇapriyan Eḻuttu 2 veṅkappaṉ tenṉavarāyaṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 24.416 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
